scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "node scripts/wait-for-backend.mjs && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm start --prefix backend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && node scripts/stage-dist.mjs
